channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture waste dumped on the roadside, 10th May
item.description:
Someone has left a large amount of furniture on the roadside

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): O'neill Path, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged playground, 10th May
item.description:
The climbing ropes have come dislodged and sharp screws exposed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath Between Rowley Gardens And Katherine Close To New River, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting level of overflowing rubbish, 10th May
item.description:
The bin is diagusting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 blue shopping baskets, 10th May
item.description:
Discarded in 2 different flower beds on this corner - probably by shoplifters who removed the baskets from a local shop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees and vegetation along the public footpath have become significantly overgrown, with branches extending over and into the walkway. The path is already narrow in places and the overhanging branches reduce accessible space for pedestrians using the route., 10th May
item.description:
The vegetation appears to require maintenance to prevent further obstruction and to keep the public footpath clear and safe to use.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken slab, 10th May
item.description:
The broken slab is dangerous for walkers could this please be replaced. It is outside 33 Oakhurst avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Oakhurst Avenue, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The vegetation along the alleyway has become heavily overgrown and appears to be unmanaged. Climbing plants and dense growth are now spreading up and over the boundary fence, with some areas beginning to lean toward the public footpath. If left untreated, the vegetation is likely to continue spreading further over neighbouring fences and become more difficult to control., 10th May
item.description:
The issue is problematic because public land and access routes should be maintained to prevent excessive overgrowth, protect neighbouring property boundaries, and keep the area manageable and accessible. Allowing vegetation to continue spreading unchecked can lead to obstruction, damage to fencing, and increased maintenance issues over time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Se1 7eh, 10th May
item.description:
• Report Damage: to the bench in front of "Panel 20," the damage (e.g., rotting wood, loose slats and missing slates to the bench. Along the jubilee walk along the National Covid Memorial Wall. Please can this be restored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambeth Palace Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous broken pavement in front of 32/34 Beechfield road, 10th May
item.description:
Broken pavement maybe due to heavy lorries parking on pavement or illegal work on pavement. Dangerous tripping hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechfield Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Chair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 162, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Recycling and rubbish bags ripped open, 10th May
item.description:
Recycling and rubbish bags dumped and street and ripped open - litter all over street. Thank you Hackney council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Abandoned car since March no licence plates, 10th May
item.description:
Abandoned car since March no licence plates. Has not moved. One of many along this stretch of road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Philimore Close, Plumstead

item.title: Sack of dumped clothing, 10th May

Fly upping

item.title: Dirty carpets and wood dumped, 10th May
item.description:
Dirty carpets and wood dumped in front of 18 Dunlace road - this has been here for sometime and is super gross, dirty and smells

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Continued issue with Fly Tipping, 10th May
item.description:
Furniture and shoes dumped on street, by 2 Dunlace road - been there for sometime. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Tree fallen on pavement in parl, 10th May
item.description:
Tree fallen on pavement in park. Happening very often now. Trees all need assessing for safety

item.title: Grass cutting got missed, 10th May
item.description:
Grass cutting on communal area missed out side 70 to 78 bowendrivese21 8pg, over two weeks ago reported ref no. 57832416 still not been done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowen Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of unwanted items by residents, 10th May
item.description:
Constant dumping of unwanted items on the hope they'll be taken, unfortunately they usually get chucked around by kids or put in the road which they think is funny but totally dangerous. Laziness not taking it to the dump.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25,25A, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
